title: How to upgrade or downgrade your subscription plan
content:
**Upgrading your plan:**
Plan upgrades take effect immediately. You are billed a pro-rated amount for the remainder of the current billing cycle.

Steps:
1. Go to Settings → Billing → Change Plan.
2. Select the new plan and click 'Upgrade Now'.
3. Confirm the pro-rated charge shown in the preview.
4. The upgrade activates within 60 seconds.

**Downgrading your plan:**
Plan downgrades take effect at the start of the next billing cycle. You will retain current plan features until then.

Important considerations before downgrading:
- If your current resource count exceeds the lower plan's limit,   CloudDash will automatically stop monitoring the excess resources   (oldest integrations are paused first).
- SSO and advanced security features are disabled immediately on downgrade to Starter.
- Historical data beyond the new plan's retention period is queued for deletion   after 30 days (giving you time to export).

**Cancellation:**
You can cancel at any time from Settings → Billing → Cancel Subscription. Your account remains active until the end of the paid billing period. Data is retained for 90 days post-cancellation, after which it is permanently deleted.
